resources.string: Video playback engine failed to initialize on this device. Check bundled native libraries and C++ runtime packaging.
Either pick a ZIP or CBZ file.
A new version of the app is available
Open local source page in browser
What you read will be displayed here
Find what to read in the «Explore» section
There are no manga matching the filters you selected
Save something from an online catalog or import it from a file.
Disable "Hide adult content" in settings to show them
New chapters of what you are reading are shown here
Ask for password when starting Kototoro
Uses less power on AMOLED screens
The data was restored, but there are errors
You can create backup of your history and favorites and restore it
The chosen configuration will be remembered for this manga
Replay the main page request without some browser client hint headers for sources that need it.
Sign in to view this content
Enter a password to start the app with
The password must be 4 characters or more
Remove all recent search queries permanently?
Delete all locally saved and imported manga files? This cannot be undone.
Delete all locally saved and imported novel files? This cannot be undone.
Delete all locally saved and imported video files? This cannot be undone.
Kototoro: Successfully fetched and mounted %1$d latest parser engines from cloud network!
Kototoro: Cloud verification complete, local parsers are up to date! (Loaded %1$d sources in total)
Kototoro: Parser network loading failed (%1$s), please try again or go to settings to switch proxy mirrors
See your recent reading, updates, library, sync, and sources in one place.
Pick up where you left off, or jump back into what you opened recently.
Your latest reading progress will appear here
Start reading to populate this card
Tracked items with new chapters will appear here
No enabled sources in this group
Open app-wide preferences without leaving the dashboard.
Trending discovery is currently available from Bangumi by default.
No Simkl schedule for this date
Simkl returned no airing entries for the selected date. Try another day.
No AniList schedule for this date
AniList returned no airing entries for the selected date. Try another day.
This site returned no seasonal entries for %1$s. Try another date in a different quarter.
Try another query or switch site.
Some devices have different system behavior, which may break background tasks.
Logging in on %s is not supported
You will be logged out from all sources
Suggest manga based on your preferences
All data is only analyzed locally on this device and never sent anywhere.
Show recommendation rows from tracking websites on the Browse page. When disabled, Browse only shows content sources.
Show additional tracking rows below content sources on the Browse page. When disabled, the hero stays visible and content sources stay expanded.
This option has moved to Browse page search bar > More > Display options.
Display rating, status, chapter count and tags on content cards
Start reading manga and you will get personalized suggestions
One option per line. Changes apply the next time the video player starts.

Common options:
• deband=yes (Reduce banding artifacts)
• interpolation=yes (Smooth playback)
• hwdec=mediacodec (Hardware decoding)

View detailed MPV documentation
mpv.conf saved. Reopen the player to apply changes.
mpv.conf reset. Reopen the player to apply changes.
Pros: Reduces compression artifacts, rebuilds lines, reduces blur, reduces noise.\nCons: May amplify ringing, banding, and blur textures.

Pros: Reduces compression artifacts, partially rebuilds lines, partially reduces blur, reduces ringing, reduces aliasing, reduces noise.\nCons: Some artifacts may not be eliminated, some lines may still be blurry, blurs textures.
Pros: Reduces noise.\nCons: Amplifies existing ringing and resampling artifacts.
Pros: Enhanced Mode A effect.\nCons: Slower than Mode A, may cause severe ringing, banding, and aliasing.
Pros: Enhanced Mode B effect.\nCons: Same as Mode B, slower than Mode B.
Pros: Enhanced Mode C effect.\nCons: Same as Mode C, slower than Mode C.
Select specific Anime4K operators to build your own preset.
The rain had stopped, but the street still held a quiet sheen. He looked up, took a breath, and stepped forward.
雨已经停了，街面却还留着一层安静的微光。他抬起头，缓缓吸了一口气，然后向前走去。
This chapter has not been downloaded yet
EPUB file not found, it may have been deleted
Select languages which you want to read manga. You can change it later in settings.
Specify genres that you do not want to see in the suggestions
Specify genres that you want to see prioritized in the suggestions
Delete selected items from device permanently?
Helps avoid blocking your IP address
Chapters will be removed in the background
Check for new chapters and notify about it
You will receive notifications about updates of manga you are reading
You will not receive notifications but new chapters will be highlighted in the lists
Found a highly similar item on %1$s: %2$s
Started checking for anime offline database updates
Checking for a newer cross-site anime index
Shows background download progress for the anime cross-site offline database.
Automatically detect if manga is webtoon
Something went wrong. Please submit a bug report to the developers to help us fix it.
Show percentage read in history and favorites
Manga marked as NSFW will never be added to the history and your progress will not be saved
Can help in case of some issues. All authorizations will be invalidated
You can create bookmark while reading manga
Enable content sources to browse content online
Enable novel sources to browse novels online
Enable video sources to browse videos online
Are you sure you want to delete the selected favorite categories?\nAll manga in it will be lost and this cannot be undone.
Press "Back" twice to exit the app
Takes full effect after app restart
You can delete the original file from storage to save space

Error details:
%1$s

1. Try to open manga in a web browser to ensure it is available on its source
2. Make sure you are using the latest version of Kototoro
3. If it is available, send an error report to the developers.
Make recent manga available by long pressing on application icon
Do not adjust the page switching direction to the reader mode, e. g. pressing the right key always switches to the next page. This option affects only hardware input devices
Turn on Wi-Fi or mobile network to read manga online
Server side error (%1$d). Please try again later
Also clear information about new chapters
Record some actions for debug purposes. Don\'t turn it on if you\'re not sure what you\'re doing
Show source icon & language on cards
To track reading progress, select Menu → Track on the manga details screen.
Sync is not supported for this service
Tap and hold on an item to reorder them
Please restart the application to apply these changes
You can select one or more .cbz or .zip files, each file will be recognized as a separate manga.
Select a directory with archives or images. Each archive (or subdirectory) is a chapter; if the folder has multiple subfolders, each will be imported as a separate comic.
Select a folder containing one manga. Subdirectories will be treated as chapters.
Select a folder containing multiple manga. Each subdirectory will be imported as a separate manga.
Select one or more files to import. Each file will be recognized as an individual item.
Select a folder containing one series. Files inside will be treated as chapters or episodes.
Select a folder containing multiple series. Each subdirectory will be imported separately.
Select one or more .cbz or .zip files. Each file will be recognized as a separate manga.
Select one or more .epub or .txt files. Each file is imported as one novel. EPUB chapters are recognized when reading; a .txt file is treated as a single chapter.
Select one or more video files (.mp4, .mkv, etc.). Each file is imported as a separate anime.
Select a folder containing one manga. Subdirectories will be treated as chapters.
Select a folder containing one novel. .txt files inside will be imported as chapters; each .epub file will be treated as a volume while preserving its internal chapters.
Select a folder containing one anime series. Each video file inside is an episode.
Select a folder containing multiple manga. Each subdirectory and each top-level .cbz or .zip file will be imported as a separate manga.
Select a folder containing multiple anime series. Each subdirectory and each top-level video file will be imported as a separate series.
Select a folder containing multiple novels. Each subdirectory and each top-level .epub or .txt file will be imported as a separate novel.
You can sign in into an existing account or create a new one
Configure WebDAV sync, backup, and restore.
Import favorites and history from Mihon-family or Aniyomi-family backup files.
This version restores favorites, history, and imported reading progress metadata.
The external backup will be imported in the background
You can use a self-hosted synchronization server or a default one. Don\'t change this if you\'re not sure what you\'re doing.
Automatically switch domains for content sources on errors if mirrors are available
Stop downloading when switching to a mobile network
Sometimes show notifications with suggested manga
All active downloads will be cancelled, partially downloaded data will be lost
Your downloads history will be permanently deleted. No downloaded files will be affected
Do you want to receive personalized manga suggestions?
WebView not available: check if WebView provider is installed
Enter your email and password to continue
Enter your username and password to continue
Use the wsrv.nl service to reduce traffic usage and speed up image loading if possible
Allow zoom in gesture in webtoon mode
Show the current time and reading progress at the top of the screen
Show page numbers in bottom corner
Clear cookies for specified domain only. In most cases will invalidate authorization
You have no access to this file or directory
Make sure you have selected the correct backup file
Do not update suggestions using metered network connections
Do not check for new chapters using metered network connections
Enter manga title, genre or source name
Upscales images using RealCUGAN (may consume significantly more battery and performance)
Limits space for upscaled images (Current setting: %1$s)
Manually clear all upscaled images from local storage
%s requires a captcha to be resolved to work properly
Too many requests. Try again later
Too many requests. Try again after %s
Show a list of related manga. In some cases it may be inaccurate or missing
Invalid data is returned or file is corrupted
No more items can be added
Whether to show zoom control buttons in the bottom right corner
Do not turn the screen off while you\'re reading manga
Super resolution was temporarily disabled to improve playback stability
Switched to a more compatible renderer to improve playback
This device is using a conservative playback mode for better compatibility
Reduces banding, but may impact performance
Suggest new sources after app update
Prompt to enable newly added sources after updating the application
Login status has expired, please re-login
This will overwrite remote favourites. Make sure you have imported site favourites before syncing.
Create local backups on a schedule. WebDAV sync can reuse them when keeping a local copy.
There are no sources available in this section, or all of it might have been already added.\nStay tuned
No available content sources found by your query
Disable NSFW sources and hide adult manga from list if possible
Reduce offscreen pages quality to use less memory
Use on-device OCR and translation, with optional API fallback
Toggle between original image and translated rendering
Print concise OCR/translation logs to Logcat
Hide translations that look garbled, unchanged, or likely OCR noise. Disable to render all non-empty translations.
Use this when model files already exist locally, for example /sdcard/... or an assets path like models/ch_PP-OCRv4
Filter official list to OCR-focused models only (recommended)
Pick from the official model list to auto-fill the download URL and version
Used when the model directory is empty. The app downloads and extracts the package, which must contain det.nb, rec.nb, and cls.nb
Version tag used for local cache, e.g. ppocrv4-20260306
Optional but recommended, leave empty to skip hash verification
Local OCR usually needs detection and recognition models, with an optional orientation classifier. If these fields are filled, they override the single package URL above.
Tap to download and prepare the model files needed for local text detection and recognition
Please select model and URL/version first
Tap to download the selected recognition model for offline manga translation
Download and manage text detection and recognition, local translation, and optional bubble detector models
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
Offline text recognition model optimized for Japanese manga
This manga already matches target language. Translation will be skipped.
Use Automatic to follow the current manga/source language shown on the details page
Manage translation, image enhancement, video enhancement, and AI model features
Configure TTS engines, voices, and imported web sources
Play a short test phrase using the current engine and voice
This is a short test phrase to verify the selected voice is working correctly.
Using language fallback for OEM TTS compatibility
Import a Legado TTS HTTP JSON config from your clipboard
Import Legado configurations from a remote JSON list
Enter the URL pointing to a Legado TTS JSON configuration.
No readable Legado configuration found in JSON
Configure provider presets, endpoints, keys, and remote model selection
API is not fully configured yet. You can set endpoint and key on the next page.
Current translation mode is Local only. These API settings are kept for later use, but they are not used right now.
Current translation mode is Local first. API settings are used only when local translation is unavailable or unsupported.
Current translation mode is API only. Every translation request will use the configured remote provider.
Configure reader-side AI super resolution and cache behavior
Configure video super resolution modes and advanced shader selection
Configure text detection and recognition, local translation models, online translation services, and bubble detection
Configure endpoint, API key, provider preset, and remote translation model
Optional, supports Authorization and X-API-Key headers
Auto-fill endpoint and default model for common OpenAI-compatible providers
Configure endpoint, key, model, and concurrency for multimodal OCR + translation
Runs OCR understanding and translation in a single multimodal request. Local OCR models and the two-stage translation pipeline are bypassed.
How many pages can be translated in parallel. Increase carefully to avoid rate limits.
Model name for OpenAI-compatible chat/completions, e.g. gpt-4o-mini
Add custom HTTP headers in JSON format (e.g. {\"Model\": \"gpt-4\"})
Request /models from current endpoint and pick one model id
Please set translation API endpoint first
Set a fixed source language before swapping
Translation layer is not ready yet
No translation log for this page yet.
No page tasks in current chapter.
Current manga language already matches target (%1$s). Translation is skipped.
Filtering by multiple genres is not supported by this manga source
Filtering by multiple states is not supported by this manga source
Search is not supported by this manga source
You can enable download slowdown for each manga source individually in the source settings if you are having problems with server-side blocking
These settings can be applied globally or only to the current manga. If applied globally, individual settings will not be overridden.
Filtering by both genres and locale is not supported by this source
Filtering by both genres and states is not supported by this source
Might help with getting the download started if you have any issues with it
Please select which content sources you would like to enable. This can also be configured later in settings
Mark selected manga as completely read?\n\nWarning: current reading progress will be lost.
This category was hidden from the main screen and is accessible through Menu → Manage categories
Your reading progress will not be saved
Custom download link for the bubble detector ONNX model
Configure actions for tappable screen areas
Use volume buttons for switching pages
Swap the direction of volume button and directional hardware key navigation (left/up/down/right)
Reset settings to default values? This action cannot be undone.
Use two pages layout on landscape orientation (beta)
Hide system status and navigation bars
The time estimation value may be inaccurate
Checking for new chapters is disabled
Ask for the destination dir every time
Do you really want to clear all reading statistics? This action cannot be undone.
There are no statistics for the selected period
Tap to preview · Long press to migrate
Manga \"%1$s\" from \"%2$s\" will be replaced with \"%3$s\" from \"%4$s\" in your history and favorites (if present)
Delete chapters you have already read from local storage to free up space
This will permanently delete all chapters marked as read from your local storage. You can re-download it later, but the imported chapters may be lost forever
Show chapters with different translations separately, rather than in one list
This manga source is not supported
This novel source is not supported
This video source is not supported
Enable the \"Pages\" tab on the details screen
No data was received from server
Please select a proper Kototoro backup file
There is no permission to access manga on external storage
Show vertical gaps between pages in webtoon mode
Use pull gesture to switch chapters in webtoon
Do not hide navigation bar and search view on scroll
You are blocked by the server. Try to use a different network connection (VPN, Proxy, etc.)

You can disable SSL certificates verification in case you face an SSL-related issues when accessing network resources. This may affect your security. Application restarting is required after changing this setting.
Skip the connectivity check in case you have issues with it (e.g. going offline mode even though the network is connected)
Do not show notifications about NSFW manga updates
Debug information about background checks for new chapters
Incompatible plugin or internal error. Make sure you are using the latest version of the plugin and Kototoro
Plugin error: %s\n Make sure you are using the latest version of the plugin and Kototoro
Provides the ability to filter manga lists by certain parameters
Search works without login. Sign in to link with %s.
Sign in to set up integration with %s. This will allow you to track your manga reading progress and status
This function is experimental. Please make sure you have a backup to avoid data loss
This function will find alternative sources for the selected manga. The task will take some time and will proceed in the background
This source does not support search with filters. Your filters have been cleared
Invalid format: expected image but got %s
Save selected manga? This may consume traffic and disk space
You can select chapters to download by long click on item in the chapter list.
Automatically delete old backup files to save storage space
Handle manga links from external applications (e.g. web browser). You may also need to enable it manually in the application\'s system settings
This source requires solving a captcha to continue
Metadata chapters are for browsing info and chapter pages only. They do not open the reader or player directly.
Temporary preview. Metadata source and reading source cannot be changed here.
Search and local binding work without login. Sign in to auto-link online progress.
Enter the chat ID where backups should be sent
Press to open chat with Kototoro Backup Bot
Delete information about manga that is not used
All available content sources will be enabled permanently
Show a pop-up message with a chapter title when it is changed
The backup will be restored in the background
Login credentials restored. Please restart the app to apply.
You will not receive notifications about solving CAPTCHA for this source but this can lead to breaking background operations (checking for new chapters, obtaining recommendations, etc)
Don\'t try to solve CAPTCHA silently in the background. You will be asked to solve it manually instead.
Try to open manga in a web browser to ensure it is available on its source.
It looks like your version of Kototoro is out of date. Please install the latest version to get all available fixes.
You can send an error report to developers, this will help us locate and fix the error
Clear browser data such as cache and cookies. Warning: Authorization in content sources may become invalid
Does not have permission to write a file
Adult manga will not be shown in suggestions. This option may work inaccurate with some sources
Show suggestions from all content sources, including disabled ones
Highlight genres that may be inappropriate for most users
The selected path cannot be used because it does not denote a file or directory
These changes will affect how manga is displayed in the app
The page will switch every ~%d seconds
This manga may contain adult content. Do you want to use incognito mode?
Changes history for recently released versions
Block advertisement in the built-in browser (beta)
Open reader in a separate task
Allows you to keep multiple readers with different manga open at the same time
Allows to continue reading in a one click. This button will not appear in incognito mode or when the history is empty
Enter your Discord Token to enable Rich Presence
Enter your Discord Token or click %s to get it using browser
Show your reading status on Discord
Reading manga on Kototoro - a manga reader app
Clear the saved Discord token and sign out from the embedded Discord session
Do not use RPC for adult content
This manga is not available to read in this source. Try searching for it in other sources or opening it in a browser for more information
This manga does not contain any chapters
Keep reading data available across devices through WebDAV.
On the first app startup of each day, restores the latest backup once; may upload once post-restore if content differs
Monitors changes and uploads backups to WebDAV on unmetered networks after a short delay, with a minimum interval of 12 hours
Save a local copy of the backup when uploading to WebDAV. Disable to upload-only without retaining local file.
A filter named \"%s\" already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?
This manga source has been marked as broken. Some features may not work
This directory with all data will be deleted if you uninstall the application
When local copy is off, periodic task uploads only to remote; local last backup time may be empty
Local copy disabled; no local backup time
EPUB file format is invalid and cannot be parsed
EPUB file is corrupted and cannot be read: %s
EPUB file is missing required component: %s
EPUB file not found, it may have been deleted: %s
Chapter index out of range: %1$d (total %2$d chapters)
Import Legado, TVBox, or JavaScript source configurations
No local TVBox spider runtime is available yet. Only direct media, playlists, or CMS fallback can be used.
Current build supports direct media and playlist-based TVBox sources.
Current build can try direct media, playlists, and a subset of CMS-style TVBox sources.
Current build provides a basic QuickJS bridge for TVBox type=4 sources. Home/category/detail/play may work, but advanced JS runtime features are still incomplete.
This TVBox site depends on spider or csp runtime.
Current build can try direct media, playlists, or some CMS candidates from this site. Spider/jar/csp behavior depends on the local runtime path.
This TVBox site depends on spider, jar, or csp. Current local runtime support is partial; check runtime diagnostics when loading fails.

This TVBox site appears to use an ordinary spider JAR or csp entry. Current build has a local JAR runtime path, but compatibility still depends on the spider API and Android framework calls used by that JAR.
This TVBox site has signals of a Guard-native spider JAR. Local support is limited and may fail when the JAR depends on native Guard checks, framework hooks, or package-sensitive behavior.
Skip unreachable sources (skip if homepage is inaccessible)
Skip sources without browsing rules (search only)
These sources usually only support Chinese websites.
Please select a file or enter a source URL
Enable sources from the internal parsers repository
Allow viewing and using parser extensions marked as broken
No valid sources found in JSON
Manage repositories, JSON sources, APK extensions, and JAR parsers
Only show Mihon and Aniyomi extensions that match your selected content languages
Delete %1$s and its imported source records where applicable?
Add URL, file, or pasted repository
Native sources do not use repositories
This repository cannot be refreshed automatically
LNReader repositories are used by the plugin browser
Refresh timed out. Check your network and try again.
Delete %1$d package(s) for the selected sources?
Delete %1$d package(s) for the selected sources?\n\nJAR packages were skipped to avoid accidental removal: %2$s
The selection contains JAR sources. Their packages were skipped to avoid accidental removal: %1$s
No removable packages were found in the current selection.
Select content languages and types. This will reset the list of enabled sources.
Install Mihon extension APKs from the Keiyoushi repository to add sources
Install Aniyomi extensions to watch anime online
Paste a compatible repository URL. Both the repository root and a URL ending with index.min.json are supported.
Add a compatible Mihon or Aniyomi repository to load available extensions.
Pull to refresh after your repositories finish syncing.
No repository is configured yet. Add one from the menu first.
No extensions match the current language filter.

Repository: %1$s
Website: %2$s
SHA-256 fingerprint:
%3$s

Verify this fingerprint with the publisher before trusting this repository.

%1$s (%2$s) is installed, but its signature does not match the selected repository fingerprint.

Repository fingerprint: %3$s

Remove the installed package before reinstalling from this repository.
%1$s %2$s cannot be installed because its library version (%3$s) is outside Kototoro\'s supported range.
Select a proxy mirror if GitHub Raw is blocked in your network.
Kototoro now uses dynamic decoupled plugins. Select preset repositories and a proxy mirror to initialize parsers first.

These extension repositories are maintained by independent online communities. The Kototoro developers have no affiliation, control, or association with these third-party repositories. I acknowledge that I am configuring these sources at my own risk.
Delay between image requests in milliseconds (0-5000)
Base delay between retries in milliseconds (500-10000)
Use reader threads and disable download request delay
Retry the task automatically instead of pausing
Number of pages to prefetch ahead (1-20)
No TVBox repositories available to switch
Automatically downscale to 1080p if resolution is higher
Automatically downscale to 720p if resolution is higher
Clamp highlights to prevent clipping when restoring or upscaling
CNN based line restoration and blur/noise reduction (Medium configuration)
CNN based line restoration and blur/noise reduction (Small configuration, faster)
CNN based line restoration and blur/noise reduction (Very Large configuration, slowest)
CNN based x2 upscaler (Small configuration, faster)
CNN based x2 upscaler (Very Large configuration, slowest)
Show the item cover as a background banner spanning the top of the screen
Enable subtle motion for animated panorama cover backgrounds
Downscale the background image before blurring to reduce GPU and memory overhead
Use bubble detector as a post-OCR helper
Run the optional detector after page OCR to help assign text blocks into bubbles for translation and rendering. It is not the primary OCR entry point.
Controls how aggressively nearby OCR text blocks are merged before translation
After text detection, recognition, and merge, let the optional bubble detector attach merged text units to bubbles for translation and rendering. Disable this to keep merged text units independent.
After text detection, recognition, and merge, keep merged text units as the translation input. Enable a bubble detector to allow post-OCR bubble-assisted grouping.
Controls how tightly translated overlays fit text outside speech bubbles
Select the model used to locate dialogue bubbles. Intelligent models handle complex pages better, while general models maximize compatibility.

Controls the strictness of suppressing overlapping bubbles. A lower value removes duplicate boxes aggressively, while a higher value preserves naturally touching dialogue bubbles. The optimal preset is loaded automatically per model.
Select the model used to locate text regions on the page. \"Auto\" uses the default PP-OCRv5 detector.
Automatically picks the best recognizer: Japanese→MangaOCR or PP-OCRv5 Server, English→PP-OCRv5 EN, Korean→PP-OCRv3 KO, Chinese/other→PP-OCRv5 Server or Mobile
Select the default tracking site for discovery
Chapters are loaded from the currently selected local source.
Bind or select a local source to browse chapters for this entity.
Current sample shows ROI-first can directly generate outputs on some pages.
Current sample mostly relies on page-first fallback. ROI-first is conservative fallback.
Current sample shows ROI-first is active, but stability is insufficient to replace page-first.
Select a proxy mirror to accelerate HuggingFace downloads.
Hide the content and source filter icons from the main search bar.
Display content sources grouped by their locale language rather than a flat list.

Comma-separated JAR prefixes. When multiple parsers share the same name, only the parser from the highest ranking repository is exposed. Example: kototoro-parsers, kotatsu-parsers-redo, kotatsu-parsers
Add a margin around the bottom navigation bar so it appears floating
Reduce the floating navigation bar width when fewer navigation items are shown
Make the reader bottom toolbar float above the screen edge
Loading indicator and progress bar style
Controls the appearance of loading spinners and progress bars.
Adjusts how strongly horizontal and vertical content cards translate, fade, and scale while sliding.
Applies the slide animation to vertical card lists. Turn it off if scrolling feels janky.
Adjust the blur strength of Haze-backed glass surfaces in Compose UI
Blur content behind supported Compose surfaces
Controls the opacity of glass-styled surfaces, even when blur is off
Enables fluid \"Hero\" animation when navigating from content lists to the details page, morphing the list cover image into the detail cover image.
View and share crash reports without adb
Show the translation action on the work details page when translation is available
